service_description: API for querying web feature support data, news, and related resources from caniuse.com.

tools.name: search_features
tools.description: Searches for web features by a given term and returns a list of matching feature IDs. Use this tool when you need to find the ID of a feature before retrieving its data.

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: The term to search for web features (e.g., 'css grid', 'async await').

tools.name: get_feature_support_data
tools.description: Retrieves comprehensive support data for one or more web features by their IDs. Use this tool to get detailed browser compatibility and usage information for multiple features.

parameters.name: feature_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of feature IDs (e.g., 'css-grid,css-subgrid,async-await') for which to retrieve full support data.

tools.name: get_feature_details
tools.description: Fetches specific supplementary data, such as related links or other specific data types, for a single web feature. Use this tool when you need specific, non-support-data details about one feature.

parameters.name: feature_id
parameters.description: The ID of the single feature to retrieve data for (e.g., 'css-grid').

parameters.name: data_type
parameters.description: The type of specific data to retrieve, e.g., 'links' for related resources.

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Retrieves a list of recent news entries and announcements related to web features and caniuse.com updates. Use this tool to stay informed about the latest developments.

tools.name: get_regions
tools.description: Retrieves a JSON object mapping region codes (e.g., country codes) to their full names. Use this to understand the geographical context of browser support data.
